purpose: Historical compatibility placement scenario for distributed two-node LocalAI RPC worker placement.
notes: Placement-only variation anchored to the historical baseline. This scenario now resolves to the explicit PL_DISTRIBUTED_TWO_NODE placement profile while preserving the original distributed two-node worker topology and keeping model, worker count, workload, prompt, temperature, and request timeout fixed.
placementResearchQuestion: Does spreading RPC workers across two nodes reduce local resource contention enough to compensate for the additional inter-node communication path?
canonicalNamingPolicy: Use placementProfileId for provider-backed cycles; keep PL1/PL2 only for historical fixed-cluster and legacy pilot compatibility.
scenarioProfileName: Historical compatibility placement scenario for distributed two-node LocalAI RPC worker placement.
